pi_items.source: Task description and metadata claim. Plausible based on DreamPlan's support for outdoor structures (Fire Pit confirmed in create_backyard_fire_pit task). Not explicitly listed in public documentation but consistent with DreamPlan's outdoor object library pattern.

Verified through task description and comparison with similar tasks (create_backyard_patio, create_backyard_fire_pit) which both use backyard as a target location. NCH DreamPlan supports outdoor area design with backyard as a standard location reference.

pi_items.verified_value: Documents\DreamPlan Projects (task-expected); Documentation states default is Documents folder
pi_items.source: Verified through multiple sources: (1) create_backyard_patio task.json shows 'project_path': 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\DreamPlan Projects\Sample House.ddp' and 'default_save_path': 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\DreamPlan Projects'; (2) NCH Software help documentation at help.nchsoftware.com states 'The default location for saving projects is the Documents folder'; (3) Framework setup in setup_dreamplan.ps1 confirms this directory structure is used in the environment.

pi_items.verified_value: NCH DreamPlan Home Design Software v9.28
pi_items.source: Verified through evidence_docs/README.md which states 'DreamPlan Home Design v9.28 by NCH Software (free/unlicensed version)'; confirmed in setup_dreamplan.ps1 installation script; verified through env.json which specifies 'dreamplan' tag and environment description mentioning 'NCH DreamPlan Home Design Software'

Verified through evidence_docs/README.md which states 'All 5 tasks share this same start state' with 'Contemporary House loaded in 3D editor'; confirmed in setup_dreamplan.ps1 which loads this as default warmup project

privileged_info_summary: The add_backyard_gazebo task is designed for NCH DreamPlan Home Design Software v9.28 running on Windows 11. The task requires placing a gazebo object in the backyard area of the Contemporary House sample project and saving it to the Documents\DreamPlan Projects directory. DreamPlan supports outdoor structure placement with Fire Pit confirmed as available in the object library. The backyard location is a standard design area in the software for landscape features.
